quoteFirst: The end of it all was that Stanley Downs accepted Helen Ranfelt’s invitation, and
quoteLast: Clay Varron drove his big car under the porte-cochère of Lawrence K. Ranfelt’s castlelike mansion on a mountaintop, to let Stanley jump down to help out the young girl who had been by his side during the ride up from the lake, the glimmer of which could be made out miles below.

quoteFirst: "When Mr. Dene left his office at
quoteLast: on Monday evening, he stood for nearly a minute, as if making up his mind in what direction to go.  Just as he was about to turn and walk up Regent Street a taxi crawled past him.  The driver spoke to him and John Dene got in and drove away."
